task_description: Polish UI/UX across quantube, quantmax, and quantai apps: integrate @quant/brand system (colors, typography, motion tokens), add Framer Motion spring-physics animations, staggered list entrances, page transitions, microinteractions. Add loading skeletons, empty states, error boundaries. Ensure full responsive 360-1440px, dark mode, 44px tap targets.

verification.summary: TypeScript compiles cleanly for all 3 apps: QuantAI has 0 errors, QuantMax has 0 app-level errors (only pre-existing @quant/database reference in server-core), QuantTube has 0 errors in modified files (remaining 13 are all pre-existing in unmodified files like channel/[id].tsx, watch/[id].tsx, ErrorBoundary.tsx, useMusicPlayer.ts). No new TypeScript errors introduced. Pre-commit hooks (prettier) pass on all commits.
